  • Uses of CheckerData in org.key_project.proofmanagement.check

    Methods in org.key_project.proofmanagement.check with parameters of type CheckerData
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Checker.check(ProofBundleHandler pbh, CheckerData data)
    Checks the given proof bundle for consistency.
    void
    DependencyChecker.check(ProofBundleHandler pbh, CheckerData checkerData)
     
    void
    MissingProofsChecker.check(ProofBundleHandler pbh, CheckerData data)
     
    void
    ReplayChecker.check(ProofBundleHandler pbh, CheckerData data)
     
    void
    SettingsChecker.check(ProofBundleHandler pbh, CheckerData data)
     
    static void
    KeYFacade.ensureDependencyGraphBuilt(CheckerData data)
    Ensures that the given CheckerData object has a valid DependencyGraph built.
    static void
    KeYFacade.ensureProofsLoaded(CheckerData data)
    Ensures that the given proof files are loaded and the ASTs are stored inside the CheckerData object.
    static void
    KeYFacade.ensureProofsReplayed(CheckerData data)
    Ensures that a replay is attempted for each proof file in bundle.
    static void
    KeYFacade.ensureSourceLoaded(CheckerData data)
    Ensures that the source files contained by the bundle stored in the given CheckerData object are loaded.
    static boolean
    MissingProofsChecker.isInternalContract(Contract c, CheckerData data)
    This method checks if the given contract is an internal contract (i.e., it is not in the user-provided sources).

    Description
    static void
    HTMLReport.print(CheckerData data, Path target)
    Prints out the given check results to a target path.
